response.justification: The candidate has substantial software engineering experience (15+ years) and strong full-stack credentials, but the role requires a hands-on C++ developer with industrial automation and secure-by-design expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and an academic project; the bulk of the career is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms. There is no evidence of IEC 62443/SDL practice, MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA, message-broker-based industrial systems, or Azure cloud work relevant to this position.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong testing/TDD discipline and mentorship via workshops and talks
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience; primary languages are TS/Node and DLang
No IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity background evident
No exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850/104, DNP 3.0) or automation domain

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Senior breadth in distributed systems and engineering practices
